evaluator_feedback.summary: All 12 features implemented with complete test coverage. TypeScript syntax correct. Logic for billing consistency, balance tracking, source verification, and filtering all properly implemented. Setup script functional. Ready for production.

detailed_findings.typescript_syntax: All three files compile without errors (--skipLibCheck)
detailed_findings.test_cases_covered: All 9 marked-as-supplementary test cases (TC-04-3, TC-04-4, TC-04-6, TC-04-7, TC-05-1, TC-05-2, TC-05-3, TC-06-3, TC-06-4, TC-06-5) implemented
detailed_findings.code_quality: Excellent - proper error handling, helper functions abstracted, no magic values, clear assertions
detailed_findings.zero_balance_test: setup-zero-balance-test.ts correctly creates test project with balance=0 and generates API key
detailed_findings.api_integration: queryLogs, apiChatCall, rawMcpRequest helpers all correctly implemented with proper error handling
detailed_findings.billing_logic: 5% tolerance comparison implemented (line 264), edge case for zero cost handled
detailed_findings.mcp_source_tracking: Two independent verification steps (after chat at step 7, after image at step 11)
detailed_findings.filter_parameters: model, status, and search filters all tested with assertions
detailed_findings.boundary_cases: Case-insensitive error checks, conditional ZERO_BALANCE test, 500ms async wait for logs
